MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-23-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT KELLY JORDAN'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED FROM NOV-02-2015 TO NOV-16-2015, AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE DEFENDANT THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. DEFENDANT MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 2, 2015 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302. =302/EHG

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KELLY JORDAN'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is denied. Moving party failed to provide courtesy copies as required by Local Rule 2.6B and the Court's ruling adopted on November 2, 2015. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Continued To Nov-16-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT KELLY JORDAN'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is continued to November 16, 2015 to give Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 2, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-23-2015 Continued To Nov-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT KELLY JORDAN'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is continued to November 2, 2015, to give all parties the opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. All parties shall immediately provide courtesy copies of their filings with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/eg
